name: United Technologies Corporation
description: United Technologies Corporation (UTC) was an American multinational conglomerate headquartered in Farmington, Connecticut. The company researched, developed, and manufactured products in numerous areas, including aircraft engines, aerospace systems, HVAC, and building systems. Following its merger with Raytheon Company in 2020, the entity was renamed Raytheon Technologies Corporation (now RTX Corporation). Prior to this transition, UTC was a major global provider of high-technology products and services to the aerospace and building industries, operating through well-known subsidiaries such as Pratt & Whitney, Collins Aerospace, Otis Elevator Company, and Carrier Corporation.
